prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan RB26DETT (2.6L twin-turbo inline-6) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, Tomei 272° camshafts) and a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (1.28 A/R turbine housing) running 28psi on E85 fuel, paired with a Nismo 740cc/min fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a Tomei 70mm titanium exhaust tip, featuring a straight-pipe design from the turbo back with a custom-fabricated 4-2-1 header (Spoon Sports design) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise turbo management

Chassis reinforcement with a Cusco bolt-in 8-point roll cage (Y33 Gloria-specific fitment) and a Nismo 4.11:1 ratio R200 limited-slip differential, paired with a custom 6-speed dogbox transmission (PPG straight-cut gears) and a Tilton twin-plate ceramic clutch (7.25-inch diameter)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Y33 Gloria-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, finished in Nissan Racing Yellow (code: 407) with matte black accents and a custom 3M satin vinyl wrap on the roof

OEM+ JDM-spec Nissan Gloria S30 front bumper lip (Nismo version) with integrated LED fog lights (Philips Ultinon Pro9000) and a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon) featuring a functional heat extractor and a clear-coated weave finish

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Gloria-specific mounting brackets), a Nismo S-Tune steering wheel (380mm diameter), and a full custom roll cage upholstered in Alcantara (MOMO design) with red stitching, paired with a Defi BF Advance multi-gauge cluster (oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR)
